meanings.definition: set out or stretch in a line, succession, or series
examples: the houses were strung out in a long row

meanings.definition: strew or distribute over an area
examples: He spread fertilizer over the lawn

meanings.definition: extend in one or more directions

examples: These birds can splay out their toes
ballet dancers can rotate their legs out by 90 degrees
The children scattered in all directions when the teacher approached

meanings.definition: spread out or open from a closed or folded state
